title: Tailwind for private consumption across various economies
section_path: Tailwind for private consumption across various economies
section_path_text: Tailwind for private consumption across various economies
summary:
Main
Beijing's stimulus measures have led to an uptick in most commodity prices. However, oil has been an exception due to reports of Saudi Arabia planning to boost production. By Michalis Voutsinas
In the first half of 2024, global economy has demonstrated notable resilience, with the OECD reporting an annualised growth rate of 3.2 percent.
